text: Another manuscript-making tool in our collections: 14th-century shaped bone used to fold & scrape/rub parchment to prepare it for writing. authorName: Rare Books & Manuscripts Library at Ohio State

GESTALT PRINCIPLES THREAD!
Gestalt is the idea that we see the whole of something before the individual parts.

Shocking footage shows a 500-pound WWII bomb exploding at Miyazaki Airport in southwest Japan earlier this week. 

The bomb detonated unexpectedly, creating a crater 23 feet wide and over three feet deep. 

Miyazaki Airport was previously a military airfield during World War II. It was determined that the explosion resulted from an American bomb likely dropped during an air raid.

The blast damaged a runway and led to the cancellation of over 80 flights, but fortunately, no one was injured.
